PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?player(COUNT(?event) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?player {
    wd:Q2951933 wd:Q3484155 wd:Q1591326 wd:Q3129131 wd:Q655010 wd:Q183023 wd:Q1193750

  ?player p:P172 ?participation .
  ?participation ps:P172 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P179 wd:Q5172118 .
  ?participation pq:P134 "2" ^^ xsd:integer .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?eventDate .

}
GROUP BY ?player
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
